title: Install Rust iOS cross-compilation targets
description:
Install the iOS Rust targets via rustup. No Xcode needed for this step.

Algorithm:
1. rustup target add aarch64-apple-ios (device arm64)
2. rustup target add aarch64-apple-ios-sim (simulator arm64)
3. rustup target add x86_64-apple-ios (simulator x86_64, legacy)

Acceptance: All 3 targets appear in rustup target list --installed | grep apple-ios.
close_reason: iOS Rust targets installed: aarch64-apple-ios, aarch64-apple-ios-sim, x86_64-apple-ios
